name: Dark Magician
desc: The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.

name: Giant Soldier of Stone
desc: A giant warrior made of stone. A punch from this creature has earth-shaking results.

name: Celtic Guardian
desc: An elf who learned to wield a sword, he baffles enemies with lightning-swift attacks.

name: Monster Reborn
desc: Target 1 monster in either GY; Special Summon it.

name: Mirror Force
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Destroy all your opponent's Attack Position monsters.

name: Harpie's Feather Duster
desc: Destroy all Spell and Trap Cards your opponent controls.

name: Curse of Dragon
desc: A wicked dragon that taps into dark forces to execute a powerful attack.

name: Big Shield Gardna
desc: A warrior bearing an enormous shield capable of deflecting any attack.

name: Summoned Skull
desc: A fiend with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the Fiend-Type monsters, this monster boasts considerable force.

name: Dark Hole
desc: Destroy all monsters on the field.

name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
desc: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible.

name: La Jinn the Mystical Genie of the Lamp
desc: A genie of the lamp that is at the beck and call of its master.

name: Feral Imp
desc: A playful little fiend that lurks in the dark, waiting to attack an unwary enemy.

name: Man-Eater Bug
desc: FLIP: Target 1 monster on the field; destroy it.
